name: Termite King

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It leans to one side and snaps with a direct bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it head-on or move away from the side it is loading into.
attacks.notes: Its baseline move for setting the pace of the fight.

attacks.name: 3-Combo Bite
attacks.tell: It chains three bites with very little downtime between them.
attacks.howToAvoid: Keep blocking until the entire chain ends before you punish.
attacks.notes: Its small chamber makes it easy to get pinned against a wall while this combo finishes.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It pulls its head back before lunging with a longer bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not backpedal in a straight line; sidestep it and punish the miss.
attacks.notes: It covers more ground than the start-up makes it seem.

attacks.name: Stunning Bite
attacks.tell: It braces itself and opens its jaws fully before delivering its heaviest bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block or dodge it carefully; even a successful defense still leaves you stunned.
attacks.notes: Its most dangerous attack when other termites are still alive around you.

description: The ruler of the termite den and guardian of the woodpile chip. It is not a formal boss, but its size, durability, and cramped chamber make it feel very close to one.
behavior: It roams the inner termite chamber and rarely leaves that room. It alternates heavy bites and strongly favors its stunning bite whenever the player stays too close for too long.
interactionWithPlayer: It is aggressive on sight. The fight is rarely a clean duel because nearby workers usually support it with acid while it keeps up close-range pressure.
interactionWithCreatures: Inside its chamber it stays passive toward worker and soldier termites. Beyond that, almost anything that disturbs it becomes a target.
strategy: The fight becomes far cleaner if you remove the nearby workers first. After that, the King is manageable: block the sequences, respect the stunning bite, and use salty or stabbing to shorten the fight.
respawnInfo: 3 days, as long as the player is out of range of its spawn chamber.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 80
3-Combo Bite: 75
Charged Bite: 70
Stunning Bite: 110

specialTraits: It is immune to dust. Its stunning bite still applies stun even when blocked perfectly.
